title: hymenophyllum seramense
intro: Hymenophyllum seramense is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum seramense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, or by using its extract in topical creams and ointments.
